purpose: Reusable task recipes for qiaomu-ppt. These turn source types into deck workflows without depending on external skills at runtime.

recipes.label: URL or article to talk deck
quality_rules: Do not summarize paragraph by paragraph.
Each body slide needs a concrete example, contradiction, mechanism, or consequence from the source.
Use generated images only for atmosphere/concept, not fake evidence.
No visible default page-number strip or generic footer.

recipes.label: README to pitch deck
quality_rules: Do not invent metrics, customers, GitHub stars, dates, or competitors.
Slide 1 has one precise pitch sentence.
Slide 4 names existing alternatives without strawman copy.
Slide 11 contains a specific ask.
Speaker notes exist and sound spoken, not marketing-generic.

recipes.label: PDF or report to evidence deck
quality_rules: Do not replace source pages/charts with fake procedural charts.
PDF page images are evidence objects and should preserve aspect ratio.
Charts must have visible takeaways and sidecar provenance.
Source URLs belong in notes or references, not on every slide by default.

recipes.label: Interactive HTML presentation
quality_rules: Motion must communicate state, hierarchy, sequence, or comparison.
Visible text should be selectable/searchable where practical.
Viewer chrome stays outside the fixed slide stage.
Images are compressed to display size and not embedded as multi-MB base64.

recipes.label: Deck to speaker notes
quality_rules: Notes should be readable aloud, not bullet dumps.
Cut hype words and generated filler.
Add transitions between topic shifts.
Mark pauses for opening, section turns, and closing.
